HomeHomeCollaborations

Our Collaborations

Building India's aerospace ecosystem through strategic partnerships

Strategic Partnerships Driving Innovation

Collaborating with leading organizations across government, academia, and industry

Airports Authority of India

Strategic partnership for aerospace infrastructure and safety training across Indian airports.

InfrastructureAviation SafetyTraining

IIT Madras & IIT Guwahati

Collaborative academic programs including specialized B.S. and research initiatives.

Academic ProgramsResearchSTEM

ISRO

Scientific collaboration for space technology awareness and research outreach programs.

Space ResearchTechnologyMissions

StartupTN

Empowering aerospace startups in Tamil Nadu through incubation and ecosystem support.

StartupsIncubationPolicy

ICAO & UN-SGAC

Global partnerships for international aviation standards and space generation participation.

Global StandardsSpace PolicyYouth

Professional Societies

Collaborations with AeSI, IEI, and HEMSI for professional development and certification.

Professional GrowthNetworkingCertification

Interested in Partnering?

Join our growing network of organizations driving aerospace innovation in India

Explore Partnership Contact Us
IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community - From School to Sky.
